title: epipactis muelleri var. cleistogama
intro: Epipactis muelleri var. cleistogama, also known as the cleistogamous autumn lady's tresses, is a type of orchid that belongs to the Epipactis genus and is native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Epipactis muelleri var. cleistogama include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and act as an antiseptic. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including colds, fever, and skin infections.
